channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-04-19)

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] The Crow Hill Company|The Crow Hill Company has released Absurdly Quiet Piano virtual instrument plugin for Win & Mac from Vault series.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: The Crow Hill Company - Finaliza: 2026-10-15

item.title: [HOT] Softube|Softube is offering 73% off on Chandler Limited Zener Limiter.?ENDSSOON!?NEW
